name: Subway Spider Kid Game
description: Get ready for an exciting adventure in Subway Spider Kid, a fast-paced endless runner full of action, speed, and fun! Take control of a brave spider-powered kid as you run through busy subway tracks, dodge obstacles, and escape danger.
instructions: W Arrow Up rarr Move Front S Arrow Down rarr Move Back A Arrow Left rarr Move Left D Arrow Right rarr Move Right - To click any button use mouse
